title: Parallax Compatibility Case (M12)
description: The case envelope. goldenSql is keyed by dialect from day one so the compatibility matrix grows without a redesign.

model.description: Path to the model descriptor, relative to core/compatibility/.

tags.description: Module/feature tags driving coverage and test selection.

operation.description: A canonical M2 algebra node (validated separately against operation.schema.json).

goldenSql.description: Optimized SQL an implementation is expected to emit, keyed by dialect.

binds.description: Ordered bind values for the ? placeholders in goldenSql.

referenceSql.description: Independent naive oracle. Required for non-trivial cases, optional for trivial single-table predicate cases.

expectedRows.description: The rows the query must return against the fixture data.

roundTrips.description: Declared number of SQL statements for the operation. Enforced from a later phase.
